word: G2529 - καθοράω - kathoráō - kath-or-ah'-o - Clearly see

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καθοράω

- Transliteration: Kathorao

- Phonetic: kath-or-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to look down, see from above, view from on high

2. to see thoroughly, perceive clearly, understand

- Origin: from G2596 and G3708

- TDNT entry: 11:19,7

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G3708; to behold fully that is (figuratively) distinctly apprehend: - clearly see.
